description: Main configurable Snakemake workflow for Bakta, eggNOG-mapper, LPS/O-antigen extraction, GO/KO summaries, plots, and selection-prep outputs.
Extract LPS/O-antigen protein and nucleotide sequences from eggNOG annotations.
Build GO-term table for LPS-related eggNOG hits.
Map rfb hits from eggNOG annotations back to Bakta coordinates.
Identify rfbA-D co-localization from Bakta GFF3 files.
Extract per-gene FASTA files for shared strict LPS genes.
Summarize broad LPS GO categories across genomes/groups.
Summarize KO/gene-name categories across genomes/groups.
Plot normalized LPS GO-term counts.
Plot normalized GO-slim category counts.
Plot O-antigen/LPS gene fractions by group.
Curate single-copy rfbABCD and waaL orthologs for downstream codon analyses.
Prepare curated ortholog FASTAs and DIAMOND curation summaries for RELAX/GARD analyses.
Founder-aware, temporal, and locus-architecture robustness analyses.
Prepare focal-gene matrix and metadata for phylogeny-aware tests.
Run phylogeny-aware source association permutation tests.
Generate PhyloPhlAn/IQ-TREE marker-tree context figure.
Generate locus architecture figure panels.
Build coordinate-level locus validation table.
Build locus GC/flanking/mobility context summaries.
Classify CDSs in surface-glycan loci by function.
Prepare RELAX sensitivity analyses.
Summarize RELAX sensitivity outputs.
Combine GARD/RELAX sensitivity summaries.
Assemble final supplementary tables from intermediate outputs.
Exploratory Pseudomonas fulva side-analysis scripts.
Expanded Pseudomonas reference-selection and annotation provenance scripts.
